scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:customsready && pnpm run build:fixitcsv && pnpm run build:stagewise && pnpm run build:poref-new && pnpm run build:quoteloop-new && pnpm run build:craftline
scripts.dev:all: pnpm run dev:customsready & pnpm run dev:fixitcsv & pnpm run dev:stagewise & pnpm run dev:poref-new & pnpm run dev:quoteloop-new & pnpm run dev:craftline
scripts.build:customsready: npm --prefix ./customsready install && npm --prefix ./customsready exec -- prisma generate && npm --prefix ./customsready exec -- prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npm --prefix ./customsready run build
